patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -17,9 +17,13 @@
     uint32_t   sleep_time_ms;  /* 0 = indefinite */
 } pmu_sleep_cfg_t;
 
-#define WAKE_SRC_RTC   (1U << 0)
-#define WAKE_SRC_GPIO  (1U << 1)
-#define WAKE_SRC_UART  (1U << 2)
+/* BREAKING: WAKE_SRC bit positions changed; RTC is now bit1, GPIO bit2.
+   Firmware saving/restoring wake source masks across resets will
+   misinterpret previously stored values. */
+#define WAKE_SRC_RTC   (1U << 1)
+#define WAKE_SRC_GPIO  (1U << 2)
+#define WAKE_SRC_UART  (1U << 3)
+#define WAKE_SRC_USB   (1U << 0)  /* new source occupies old RTC bit */
 
 void pmu_init(void);
 void pmu_enter_sleep(const pmu_sleep_cfg_t *cfg);
